moments.title: World Cup Semifinals & Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 reaches its climax this week with the semifinals on July 14th and 15th, and the grand final on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: England's shot at glory
angles.copy: England face Argentina in the World Cup semi-final on Wednesday. Can they make it to the final for a chance at glory on Sunday? The whole country is watching! #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Final countdown
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final is just days away on Sunday! Who do you reckon will lift the trophy this year? #WorldCupFinal

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's four major tournaments, tees off its main competition days from Thursday, July 16th to Sunday, July 19th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport.

angles.name: Golf's biggest major
angles.copy: The Open Championship is underway this week at Royal Birkdale! Who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug on Sunday? #TheOpen

angles.name: Royal Birkdale hosts
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is hosting The Open Championship from Thursday. One of the most iconic courses in golf! Are you a fan of the links? #Golf

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23rd to 26th, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi across four days of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival countdown
angles.copy: Just 10 days until Latitude Festival kicks off in Suffolk! Who's heading to Henham Park for David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi and more? #Latitude2026

angles.name: Suffolk's big weekend
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! From music to comedy, it's a huge weekend for Henham Park. What's your top pick from the lineup? #Suffolk

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's Chart Record
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has made history this week, securing its 17th week at Number 1 on the Official UK Singles Chart, making it the longest-running British single to top the charts.

angles.name: Historic chart topper
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is Number 1 for a record-breaking 17th week. What a track! #OfficialCharts

angles.name: Longest running British #1
angles.copy: 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean is officially the longest-running British Number 1 single ever! Are you still loving it? #NewMusic

moments.title: John Stones' Viral Chart Impact
moments.blurb: ANOTR's 'Talk To You' is climbing the Official UK Singles Chart after a viral video showed England defender John Stones dancing to it during the World Cup.

angles.name: Football's influence on charts
angles.copy: That viral John Stones dance has sent ANOTR's 'Talk To You' soaring up the charts! Gotta love how football gets us moving. #WorldCup #ChartClimb

angles.name: New dance anthem?
angles.copy: Heard 'Talk To You' by ANOTR lately? It's the track John Stones made famous with his moves, and now it's a huge chart hit! #DanceMusic

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Finale
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated finale of Love Island UK 2026 is expected to air on Monday, July 27th, bringing another season of villa drama to a close.

angles.name: Love Island ending soon
angles.copy: It's almost time to crown the winners! The Love Island 2026 finale is set for Monday, July 27th. Who's your favourite couple to take the crown? #LoveIsland

angles.name: Drama heating up
angles.copy: With the Love Island final just two weeks away, the drama in the villa is at an all-time high! What's been your favourite moment this series? #LoveIslandUK

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are either underway or beginning this week across the UK, marking the start of a long break for students and families.

angles.name: Schools out for summer
angles.copy: For many, the summer holidays are officially HERE! If you're off school or college, what are your plans for the long break? #SummerHolidays

angles.name: Family fun planning
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are kicking off across the UK this week! Time for family adventures, staycations, or just chilling out? #SummerBreak

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for hits like 'You're No Good' and 'Blue Bayou', celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Happy 80th Linda Ronstadt
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to the iconic Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! What's your favourite song from the rock and country legend? #LindaRonstadt

angles.name: Celebrating a music legend
angles.copy: From rock to country, Linda Ronstadt has done it all. She turns 80 this week – a true music legend! #MusicIcon

moments.title: Geezer Butler's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and primary lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Sabbath legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Black Sabbath's legendary bassist and lyricist, Geezer Butler, on Thursday! What's your ultimate Sabbath track? #BlackSabbath

angles.name: Heavy metal pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a rock 'n' roll Happy Birthday to Geezer Butler! The Black Sabbath icon turns 77 this week. #HeavyMetal

moments.title: Tom Fletcher's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, the lead vocalist and guitarist of popular British band McFly, turns 41 on July 17th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Tom Fletcher
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to McFly's Tom Fletcher on Thursday! What's your favourite McFly hit? #McFly

angles.name: McFly frontman turns 41
angles.copy: Can you believe Tom Fletcher is 41 this week? The McFly frontman still brings the pop-punk energy! What's your top McFly memory? #PopMusic

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton's 44th Birthday
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, one third of the iconic British girl group Atomic Kitten, celebrates her 44th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Atomic Kitten birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 44th Birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton on Thursday! What's your favourite AK hit? #AtomicKitten

angles.name: Pop princess turns 44
angles.copy: Natasha Hamilton of Atomic Kitten fame turns 44 this week! Still belting out those noughties anthems. #PopNostalgia

moments.title: Spencer Davis' 87th Birthday
moments.blurb: Spencer Davis, the Welsh musician best known for leading The Spencer Davis Group, would have celebrated his 87th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Remembering Spencer Davis
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Spencer Davis, who would have been 87 on Thursday. His group gave us classics like 'Gimme Some Lovin'! #SpencerDavis

angles.name: Welsh music icon
angles.copy: A true Welsh music icon, Spencer Davis, would have been 87 this week. His legacy lives on through his incredible music. What's your favourite Spencer Davis Group track? #WelshMusic
